summary: Hydrated representative #63994 is no longer live; #72400 is the landed maintainer replacement for the repeated-character gateway stream-merge subfamily. The still-open PRs are related streaming work but not closable in this dedupe pass: #46985, #47377, and #47399 cover WebChat cumulative stream/tool-boundary rendering; #54374 covers gateway segment-boundary handling; #60063 covers provider overlap/replace plumbing. No close/comment/label mutation is planned.
